emails.subject: reactivate books
emails.body: reactivate books please reactivate/unarchive the following books we are going to have to start calcing these today. Intra-Central-Phy and Intra-East-Phy. Thanks. PL

emails.subject: RE: reactivate books
emails.body: RE: reactivate books Phillip sorry for such a late response but I have been on vacation. I looked up the books mentioned below and the INTRA-CENTRAL-PHY book is active. I do not see the INTRA-EAST-PHY book in risktrac. Please let me know if I need to create additional books. Thanks, Susan To: Trevino, Susan

emails.subject: RE: reactivate books
emails.body: RE: reactivate books Phillip sorry for such a late response but I have been on vacation. I looked up the books mentioned below and the INTRA-CENTRAL-PHY book is active. I do not see the INTRA-EAST-PHY book in risktrac. Please let me know if I need to create additional books. Thanks, Susan To: Trevino, Susan

emails.subject: RE: reactivate books
emails.body: Intra-East-Phy should be Intra-Northeast-phy. Is this in risktrac? PL To: Love, Phillip M.

emails.subject: RE: reactivate books
emails.body: thanks. PL To: Love, Phillip M.
